settings.heading: Soles Care Kit
settings.subheading: Restore midsoles and outsoles with professional-grade cleaners built to cut through ground-in dirt, yellowing, and grime.

settings.heading: Midsole Revival
settings.text: Bring oxidized and stained midsoles back to life with targeted sole restoration formulas.

settings.heading: Outsole Deep Clean
settings.text: Remove embedded dirt from rubber outsoles and tread grooves for a ground-up refresh.

settings.heading: Street-Tested Results
settings.text: Engineered for Indian dust, rain, and daily wear so your soles look fresh longer.
